title: Fetid Baghnakhs
body:
# Content:
**Add 3d Fetid Baghnakhs from terraria**

![Fetid Baghnakhs](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/terraria_gamepedia/images/0/0d/Fetid_Baghnakhs.png/revision/latest?cb=20221122015412&format=original) *Original Terraria item

**Model from resource pack:**

![made by me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46a6fc97fed99ca7265b888565b9345dfb46d23_0.webp)

# Guide:
Rename any vanilla minecraft sword into "Fetid Baghnakhs"
Done

# Small tip:
Mod "[**Rp Renames**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)" is very helpful,
hightly recomended to install.

### Credits:
I was inspired not only by Terraria's Fetid Baghnakhs,
but also by [biomancy](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomancy)
i really love their models and style
source of inspiration were ravenous claws
